title: Technical Electrical: Redux
description: A slight tweak of the Technical Electrical: Eclectic Espionage modpack to add a few features for a private server.
body:
This is a near-identical copy of waddon1's fantastic pack Technical Electrical: Eclectic Espionage (original description copied below), but with a few additional mods to suit the playstyle of my server group. 

All credit goes to the original creators of the mods and the pack, I just assembled them.

=-=-=-=-=

THE FUTURE IS NOW! The Definitive Modpack of the Technical Electrical Series!

Technical Electrical allows you to create anything you can imagine in your worlds. You can build machines that can allow you to take control of the world or embrace nature and magic to integrate yourself into the world and its biomes. Technical Electrical's philosophy is that one mod for one use, which helps keep the pack light by not including mods without a reason for them, they are all carefully chosen to help keep resource usage low, while having a fun modded experience. Technical Electrical is about having fun in a modded environment. A minimal stress modpack, just kickback and relax with friends! There are a large variety of tech and magic mods letting you play how you want.

This pack has also been optimised for Steam Deck, the only thing you have to do is assign key bindings, but it works and performs well on the Steam Deck.

Servers
There is also a Dedicated Server for Eclectic Espionage that can be joined using the 'Connect to Server' button on the main menu! Create your own server with the server packages below!
Eclectic Espionage: (Server can be found alongside the pack file on Modrinth. It can be installed using Superpack https://github.com/Gaming32/Superpack/releases/tag/v0.3)

Mechanistic Mayhem: (https://drive.google.com/file/d/10Kzi4HCTQ9Eh641nj7Gg6UUabHNWnvt9/view?usp=sharing)

Final Frontiers: (https://drive.google.com/file/d/18JbhAAToDHyT3PH6EFFJNYivSb3JfE0L/view?usp=sharing)

To stay up to date with future updates be sure to join the Technical Electrical Discord Server! https://discord.gg/JbfD6s9

Current review

Over 100 mods including:

Boatload mod by TeamAbnormals:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/boatload

And much more like Create, Mekanism and Immersive Engineering! Other included mods can be seen in the file dependencies
